name: Trypanophobia Thad
description:
Trypanophobia is the fear of needles used for medical procedures

Updates are in tow for this and the other Phobia Drones!

Luna Dragon on Twitter created this picture, and it's got a fresh new redesign! I'm not removing the watermark, not because I'm lazy, but because it's their art, and they deserve recognition, since it took months before I found out that they made it.

This is from this post. https://gamejolt.com/p/murder-drones-characters-w-if-they-had-phobias-v6ibptwv

Of if every MD character had phobias, and what they'd look like if... I dunno weaponized by it?
creator: Showman682
